workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: I have this exec meeting notes from Treyarch Global that needs identify the blockers. Board meeting is next week.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-02 16:29 EST
Subject: security posture - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
Date: 2024-02-16 11:15 EST
Subject: Re: Re: security posture Timeline

Just checking in on the security posture proposal. Our DevOps Lead is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Laura Schmidt <laura.schmidt@treyarchglob.com>
To: Raj Mehta <raj.mehta@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-05 17:15 EST
Subject: security posture - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with security posture. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Treyarch Global: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct security posture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
